zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Eleanor Douglas於大約1370年出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾道格拉斯時，她的父親Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell46歲，母親Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas40歲。她於1382年之前與John de Dundas - Tenth Lord of Dundas在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1425年在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾費洛斯 豪斯享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Eleanor Douglas于大约1370年出生在英国苏格兰藍納可爾道格拉斯时，她的父亲Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell46岁，母亲Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas40岁。她于1382年之前与John de Dundas - Tenth Lord of Dundas在苏格兰米德洛迪安结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1425年在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾費洛斯 豪斯享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Eleanor Douglas was born about 1370, in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell, was 46 and her mother, Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas, was 40. She married John de Dundas - Tenth Lord of Dundas before 1382, in Midlothian, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1425, in Philorth House, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, at the age of 56.

Elle a épousé John de Dundas - Tenth Lord of Dundas avant 1382, à Midlothian, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1425, à Philorth House, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 56 ans.

ko.Dundas Castle, West Lothian, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 웨스트 로스이언 던다스 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Douglas(이)가 대략 1370년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 더글라스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1382년 이전 스컷랜드 미들로스이언에서 John de Dundas - Tenth Lord of Dundas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1425년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 필로르스 허스에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Eleanor Douglas родилась около 1370 г. в местности доуглас, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Dundas - Tenth Lord of Dundas перед 1382 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1425 г. в местности филорт хоус, абирдиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 56 лет.
